t.t-value: available_langs.filtered(lambda l: l.code.startswith('en' if is_arabic else 'ar'))

div.t-attf-class: alaj-drawer-node #{submenu._is_active() and 'is-active' or ''} #{submenu.child_id.filtered(lambda menu: menu.is_visible) and 'has-children' or ''}

div.p: Abdullatif H. Abdullatif & Sons Co. Leading provider of laboratory chemicals, equipment, and scientific instruments in Saudi Arabia.

div.span: © 2025 Abdullatif H. Abdullatif & Sons Co. All rights reserved.
